subcodes.title: Lawh-i-'Andalib
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, through His might, hath caused the Sun of Utterance to shine forth and, through His sovereignty, hath made manifest the Moon of Proof, He Who by His command hath rolled up that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی سخر شمس البیان بقدرته و قمر البرهان بسلطانه الذی بامره طوی ما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @justice and wrath of God, @call to action
